mechanics.name_guess: Before requesting this option; players should be advised
mechanics.breadcrumb_path: Rules Compendium > Page 023 > npcs > Before requesting this option; players should be advised
mechanics.excerpt: Before requesting this option; players should be advised that the Life Path can become increasingly dangerous for those who loiter (see Repeating Paths_ p: 251. Rather than starting play as seasoned veteran; players might prefer to skip those extra tours Of duty for the sake of their characters well-being: There' plenty of time to become seasoned during game playl FOLLOWING THE PATHS Each time your character follows path, he or she may receive skills and traits (p. 23), or the path may affect the char acter's Attributes (below).
